# PHIL.007 ? Pre-Socratic Philosophy

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** pre_socratic_philosophy
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Naturalistic explanations; search for fundamental substance (arche); rational inquiry into nature; cosmological speculation

## Application
Seek natural rather than supernatural explanations; look for fundamental principles underlying phenomena; use reason to understand cosmos

## Key Values
- Natural causation
- Fundamental principles
- Rational cosmology
- Material basis

philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, pre-socratic-philosophy
